Aug 17, 2025 Laurence VJ Day 2025 - Birmingham remembers Community It was an honour to join the dignified VJ Day civic memorial service at the Birmingham Hall of Memory and to represent Northfield at the flag-raising ceremony this morning. Aug 15, 2025 Laurence Supported exempt accomodation Public services I was in the city centre earlier to talk to the Council and police about Supported Exempt Accommodation (SEAs).
